          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Critical equipment malfunction. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.
Another year. Critical equipment malfunction. The colony feels hopeful. My resolve grows stronger.
Year 89 on Mars. Critical equipment malfunction. Morale is hopeful. We have 243 food units left.

meta_awareness: Vulcan (year 89): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
